title: デビュー戦の後に・帝王、発進！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finishing her debut, Tokai Teio feels a sense
of growth as she takes her first step in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Teio holds a training session with
Air Groove, who points out her lack of experience
but praises her potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She still has a lot of room for improvement. If
she's going to take on Symboli Rudolf, she'll have
to show considerable power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To prove herself, she aims to conquer the Classics
and claim the same title as Symboli Rudolf before
her: that of Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before she aims for the first of the formidable
Classics, we decide she should test her skills with
the Wakagoma Stakes.
